\tzpentry{ID4885}{Coupled Quantum Hamiltonian Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4885 introduces Coupled Quantum Hamiltonian Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\hat{H}_{\text{tunnel}} = -\frac{\hbar^2}{2m_{\text{eff}}} \nabla^2 + V_{\text{barrier}}(r, \theta, \phi, t)\]
